notes: Pure assembly file with no sorry, no set_option maxHeartbeats, and no proofs longer than 30 lines; all 9 declarations are theorems. The file provides two parallel top-level versions of the Route-C Leaf-1 conclusion (one with all six genuineness witnesses exposed, one with the three scalar-side witnesses discharged by mulByInt_isGenuineWith), and is likely used externally by a qf_nonneg or HasseBound caller. The comp_eq_mulByInt_of_genuine wrapper is the key intra-file building block used by three other declarations.
